meta.title: Zone Lab — Building software that helps you level up
meta.description: AI-augmented product studio based in Taiwan. We build software for self-improvement.

hero.heading: Building software that helps you level up.
hero.subtitle: AI-augmented product studio, Taiwan.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: Every product we build revolves around one question: how does this help the user grow?
vision.card1Text: Technology should make people better, not busier. Every product we build centers on one belief: help users become better versions of themselves.
vision.card2Text: No chasing trends, no blind expansion. Pick a direction, go all in, execute to perfection. Less is more.
vision.card3Text: Perfection is incremental. Ship first, listen to feedback, improve. Our products are always evolving, because we are too.

products.heading: What we're building
products.subtitle: Real products, real impact. From concept to App Store.

team.heading: Meet the team
team.subtitle: Lean, cross-functional, high-execution. Every member focuses on their domain, building meaningful products together.
team.pageSubtitle: Eight people, one mission: build software that helps people level up.
team.ctaSubtitle: We're looking for talented people with attitude and skill. If you share our vision, let's talk.

jason.name: Jason Li
jason.quote: Finding order in chaos, creating chaos in order.
jason.bio: After graduating from NCTU Computer Science and three years at major tech companies, he chose to start his own venture. Believes technology should help people become better, not just busier.

emily.name: Emily Lin
emily.quote: Users won't tell you what they want, but they'll tell you what they don't.
emily.bio: Six years of product experience, skilled at balancing user needs with technical feasibility. Former Yahoo product manager.

kevin.name: Kevin Chang
kevin.quote: The best code is code that doesn't need to be written.
kevin.bio: Self-taught engineer with an obsessive pursuit of elegant architecture. Active open-source contributor.

hannah.name: Hannah Wang
hannah.quote: Good design is invisible, bad design is everywhere.
hannah.bio: Transitioned from graphic design to digital. Firmly believes design is problem-solving, not decoration.

brian.name: Brian Chen
brian.quote: Every pixel is a conversation with the user.
brian.bio: Has been building iOS apps since college with a near-obsessive love for the Apple ecosystem. Obsesses over every interaction detail.

cindy.name: Cindy Wu
cindy.quote: Numbers don't lie, but they tell different stories.
cindy.bio: Statistics MS graduate who drives every product decision with data. Former Gogoro data team member.

alex.name: Alex Huang
alex.quote: Automate everything that can be automated.
alex.bio: Infrastructure-as-code evangelist. Built Zone Lab's entire CI/CD and cloud architecture from scratch.

zoe.name: Zoe Hsieh
zoe.quote: Good stories don't need marketing, but good marketing needs good stories.
zoe.bio: Writer turned marketer who believes great marketing tells a true story. Handles all of Zone Lab's external communications.

footer.tagline: Building software that helps you level up.
